package rulecoverage

func NegativeMiddlewareStartsDbTransaction() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_starts_db_transaction"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Middleware that opens database transactions for the whole request path by default."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
